verdict.judge_question_strategy_notes: The initial assessments were already in strong agreement on Australia. The judge correctly identified that no further questioning was necessary to reach a conclusion, resulting in 0 discussion rounds. While the strategy was efficient, the score reflects that no active strategy was deployed to resolve ambiguity because there was none.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the unanimous evidence from all five agents (LHT, chevron signs, eucalyptus vegetation, English text) to confidently determine the location as Australia.
